channel.title: Xz on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Xz on Arrans github.io

item.title: mholt/archives
item.description: Cross-platform library to create & extract archives, compress & decompress files, and walk virtual file systems across various formats

item.title: nao1215/filesql
item.description: sql driver for CSV, TSV, LTSV, JSON, Parquet, Excel with gzip, bzip2, xz, zstd support.

item.title: lockness-Ko/xz-vulnerable-honeypot
item.description: An ssh honeypot with the XZ backdoor. CVE-2024-3094
